execution_scope: Exactly one GitHub create_issue operation for ai-org-labs/ai-organization-framework matching payload hash sha256:v87-github-issue-create-preflight; no other provider target, payload, credential scope, or operation is approved.
side_effect_boundary: At most one issue creation matching the approved payload hash; no live call occurs in this preflight.
redaction_boundary: No credentials, tokens, raw private payload, or provider response bodies are persisted.
rollback_plan: If later execution creates the issue, rollback operation is delete_created_issue and must be verified by a separate rollback artifact.
credential_boundary: Only a scoped GitHub issues:write credential may be used by a later execution command; this bridge does not read credentials.
budget_boundary: Maximum approved budget is USD 0 and maximum provider calls is 1.
stop_conditions: stop if approved scope hash changes
stop if human approval is revoked or expired
stop if adapter capability no longer includes external_write
stop if rollback support is not available
not_proven: This approval bridge proves only bounded preflight authorization; it does not prove live GitHub execution, credential validity, provider correctness, rollback success, or autonomous external execution safety.
